queries.sql: SELECT CONCAT(st.first_name, ' ', st.last_name) AS student_name, ROUND(AVG(g.score / g.max_score * 100), 2) AS avg_score_percent FROM grades g JOIN students st ON g.student_id = st.id GROUP BY st.id, st.first_name, st.last_name ORDER BY avg_score_percent DESC LIMIT 50

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT CONCAT(st.first_name, ' ', st.last_name) AS student_name, ROUND(AVG(g.score / g.max_score * 100), 2) AS avg_score_percent FROM grades g JOIN students st ON g.student_id = st.id GROUP BY st.id, st.first_name, st.last_name ORDER BY avg_score_percent DESC LIMIT 50
